name: hve-spielberg
description: End-to-end video production pipeline with design thinking. A 6-phase orchestrator (Discovery → Storytelling → Capture → Design → Production → Audio & Render) that turns your app into a polished promo, showcase, or tutorial video, rendered with HyperFrames (HTML + GSAP).

interface.shortDescription: Turn your app into a promo, showcase, or tutorial video
interface.longDescription: Drive end-to-end video production with hve-spielberg: design-thinking discovery, narrative storyboarding, Chrome DevTools capture, HyperFrames (HTML + GSAP) scene design and composition, then ElevenLabs voiceover, Whisper timing verification, and Freesound music mixed and rendered to MP4. Three content modes — promo (marketing), showcase (portfolio/demo), or tutorial (walkthrough/how-to).
defaultPrompt: Create a 60-second promo video for my app
Make a showcase video from my screenshots
